title: rubus × subjunctiformis
intro: Rubus × subjunctiformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a rare and unique plant that is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The plant contains anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × subjunctiformis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, protect against oxidative stress, and aid in the prevention of certain cancers. The plant's leaves and fruits can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and a popular choice among herbalists.
